name: Belcando Dog Adult Dry Food – Multi-Croc 1kg
shortDescription: Belcando Adult Multi-Croc Dry Dog Food combines nutrition, taste, and variety in every bowl. Featuring different kibble shapes, vegetable chips, and pasta, this unique recipe creates an exciting mealtime experience while still being highly digestible and nutritionally balanced for adult dogs with normal activity levels.
description: Made with high-quality ingredients and enriched with rice for easy digestion, BELCANDO Multi-Croc provides complete daily nutrition while supporting overall health, energy, and vitality. Key Benefits Unique mix of kibble shapes, pasta, and vegetable chips Highly digestible recipe with nutritious rice 70% animal protein ratio to support strong muscles and vitality Rich in beef, poultry, and fish proteins for balanced nutrition Special sauce effect enhances flavour and palatability Ideal for picky eaters Supports healthy digestion and daily wellbeing Made without soya and milk products Special Sauce Effect For an even tastier meal, simply mix 3 parts kibble with 1 part warm water (40–50°C). A delicious gravy instantly forms around the kibble, creating an irresistible flavour experience dogs love. Main Ingredients Maize Rice (14%) Poultry protein Pasta (7%) Vegetables including peas and carrots (4%) Poultry fat Fish meal from sea fish Brewers’ yeast Egg Coconut vegetable oil Protein Sources Belcando Adult Multi-Croc contains a carefully balanced protein blend: Beef – 35% Poultry – 30% Fish – 5% Animal protein ratio to total protein: 70% Analytical Constituents Protein: 24% Fat Content: 11% Crude Ash: 7% Crude Fibre: 2.8% Moisture: 10% Calcium: 1.4% Phosphorus: 1% Sodium: 0.3% Added Vitamins & Nutrients Enriched with essential vitamins, taurine, minerals, lecithin, and natural antioxidants to help support: Healthy immune function Strong muscles and bones Healthy skin and coat Overall vitality and wellbeing Suitable For Adult dogs with normal activity levels, including picky eaters that enjoy extra flavour and texture variety. Always provide fresh drinking water alongside feeding.
